V2.0.1.summary: JARVIS v2.0.1 with fully synchronized standalone listener background service, physical feedback loop prevention using thread-isolated listener mute flag, and silent active Gemini CLI terminal focusing.

V2.0.5.summary: Archive deep-dive findings of the vocal and arbitration subsystems audit in version 2.0.5 manifest.
